name: Bikurey Hasade (Holdings) Ltd
summary: Bikurey Hasade (Holdings) Ltd. engages in growing, marketing, and distributing fresh vegetables and fruits in Israel and internationally. The company offers dried fruits, fresh fruits and vegetables, organic produce, and packaged and chilled products. It also provides logistics distribution and collection, packaging and pallets, and accounting services. The company is based in Kiryat Malakhi, Israel.
